import subprocess

def convert_images(image_paths):
    results = []
    for path in image_paths:
        output = path.replace(".png", ".webp")
        subprocess.run(["cwebp", path, "-o", output], check=True)
        results.append(output)
    return results

def check_hosts(hostnames):
    statuses = {}
    for host in hostnames:
        result = subprocess.run(["ping", "-c", "1", host], capture_output=True)
        statuses[host] = result.returncode == 0
    return statuses
